subcodes.first_line: O ancient companion! Your letter was received, and from its contents it became evident that you are grieved. The right is with you [3.5s]... ...This house of sorrows will become a rose-garden one day; grieve not!
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای همدم قدیم نامه شما وصول یافت و از مضمون واضح گردید که دلخونید حق با شماست
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @past, present and future of Iran, @praise and encouragement, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
